display.name: Raymarch Sphere
display.author: prism
display.blurb: Mandelbox-fold sphere SDF with cyan rim light; mid-band audio modulates iteration.

annotation.technical_notes: 64-step raymarched signed distance field of a sphere folded through Mandelbox-style abs+rotate iterations; analytic normal via central differences; Lambert + Fresnel rim shading with cyan accent. Mid-band audio amplitude modulates the sphere radius.
